zh.Irnhan, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.Ingham, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾英厄姆
zh.Irnham, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Andrew Luttrell於1313年3月27日出生在英國林可爾史爾易爾納姆時，他的父親Geoffrey de Luttrell III37歲，母親Agnes Sutton23歲。他於1320年2月22日與Beatrice Scrope在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他去世於1399年9月6日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年86歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆。

zh-hans.Irnham, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾易爾納姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Andrew Luttrell于1313年3月27日出生在英国林可爾史爾易爾納姆时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Luttrell III37岁，母亲Agnes Sutton23岁。他于1320年2月22日与Beatrice Scrope在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他去世于1399年9月6日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年86岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾易爾納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Andrew Luttrell was born on 27 March 1313, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Geoffrey de Luttrell III, was 37 and his mother, Agnes Sutton, was 23. He married Beatrice Scrope on 22 February 1320, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 6 September 1399, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Andrew Luttrell est né le 27 mars 1313, à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Luttrell III, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes Sutton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Scrope le 22 février 1320, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 6 septembre 1399, à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Andrew Luttrell am 27. März 1313 in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Luttrell III 37 und seine Mutter Agnes Sutton 23. Er hat am 22. Februar 1320 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Beatrice Scrope geheiratet. Er starb am 6. September 1399 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew Luttrell è nato il il 27 marzo 1313 nel Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Luttrell III, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Sutton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice Scrope il 22 febbraio 1320, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 6 settembre 1399, nel Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Irnham, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew Luttrellが1313年3月27日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Luttrell IIIは37歳，母Agnes Suttonは23歳であった。1320年2月22日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでBeatrice Scropeと結婚した。彼は1399年9月6日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムで86歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew Luttrell(이)가 1313년 3월 27일 영국 링코실르 언함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Luttrell III(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Sutton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1320년 2월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Beatrice Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1399년 9월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함에 묻혔다.

pt.27 March 1313–6 SEP 1399: 27 de março de 1313–6 de setembro de 1399
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew Luttrell nasceu em 27 de março de 1313, em Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Luttrell III, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Sutton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Scrope em 22 de fevereiro de 1320, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 6 de setembro de 1399, em Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Andrew Luttrell родился 27 марта 1313 г. в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Luttrell III было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Sutton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Scrope 22 февраля 1320 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 6 сентября 1399 г. в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.27 March 1313–6 SEP 1399: 27 de marzo de 1313–6 de septiembre de 1399
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Andrew Luttrell nació el 27 de marzo de 1313, en Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Luttrell III, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes Sutton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Beatrice Scrope el 22 de febrero de 1320, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 6 de septiembre de 1399, en Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
